growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

up.method: experimentally measured glucose uptake rate vs dry cell biomass; used to constrain GEM; numeric value reported in Table S5 (supplementary, not in main text)

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.snippet: P1 Micrococcus luteus P1 ... Experimental growth rate Mean 0.179 SD 0.0137
growth_records.notes: Table 1: experimental growth rate (h^-1) mean=0.179 SD=0.0137 for Micrococcus luteus P1; in-silico FBA growth rate=0.188 h^-1. Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.179=3.872 h. Aerobic batch shake-flask in PCS medium (0.5% peptone, 0.5% NaCl, 0.1% yeast extract, 0.15% CaCO3, 0.5% cellulosic material), pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h. Glucose uptake rate measured experimentally per strain to constrain models (Table S5) but numeric value not in main text. Strain isolated from wood-feeding termite gut.

growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

up.method: per-strain experimental glucose uptake used to constrain member GEMs (Table S5); community value not tabulated

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.method: reported (experimentally measured community growth rate, SD=0.023 h^-1)
growth_records.snippet: Micrococcus luteus P1 + Cellulomonas denverensis P3 ... Community growth (h-1) 0.291 SD 0.023 ; Sum of individual 0.263 ; DES 1.106
growth_records.notes: Table 2: experimental community (co-culture) growth rate=0.291 h^-1 (SD 0.023); sum of individual monoculture growth rates=0.263 h^-1 (SD 0.01). Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.291=2.382 h. Model-derived Avg PGSI=0.006, Avg PMA=0.126; experimental degree of enzymatic synergism DES=1.106. Growth increment vs sum-of-individuals is the synergism metric. Aerobic batch shake-flask coculture in PCS-CMC medium, pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h.

growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

up.method: per-strain experimental glucose uptake used to constrain member GEMs (Table S5); community value not tabulated

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.method: reported (experimentally measured community growth rate, SD=0.014 h^-1)
growth_records.snippet: Micrococcus luteus P1 + Oceanobacillus sojae P4 ... Community growth (h-1) 0.197 SD 0.014 ; Sum of individual 0.254 ; DES 0.776
growth_records.notes: Table 2: experimental community (co-culture) growth rate=0.197 h^-1 (SD 0.014); sum of individual monoculture growth rates=0.254 h^-1 (SD 0.004). Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.197=3.519 h. Model-derived Avg PGSI=0.307, Avg PMA=0.097; experimental degree of enzymatic synergism DES=0.776. Growth increment vs sum-of-individuals is the synergism metric. Aerobic batch shake-flask coculture in PCS-CMC medium, pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h.

growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.method: reported (experimentally measured community growth rate, SD=0.018 h^-1)
growth_records.snippet: Micrococcus luteus P1 + Brevibacterium sp. P5 ... Community growth (h-1) 0.384 SD 0.018 ; Sum of individual 0.387 ; DES 0.992
growth_records.notes: Table 2: experimental community (co-culture) growth rate=0.384 h^-1 (SD 0.018); sum of individual monoculture growth rates=0.387 h^-1 (SD 0.022). Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.384=1.805 h. Model-derived Avg PGSI=0.031, Avg PMA=0.069; experimental degree of enzymatic synergism DES=0.992. Growth increment vs sum-of-individuals is the synergism metric. Aerobic batch shake-flask coculture in PCS-CMC medium, pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h.

phenotypes.base_medium: Substrate-utilisation assay; base medium per the original source
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 7673 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/7673

phenotypes.base_medium: Acid/gas-production test: peptone/complex base + substrate + pH indicator — positive = fermentative acid production, NOT growth on the substrate as a sole carbon source (interpret with care for model validation)
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 7673 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/7673

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
